zh.lifeSummary: 當Lord William Tracy The Elder Sherriff於1400年出生在英國格盧斯特斯爾托丁頓時，他的父親Sir William de Tracy II21歲，母親Alice de la Spine19歲。他和Margaret Pauncefort至少有4個兒子和2個女兒。他去世於1460年在他的家鄉享年60歲，埋葬在英國格盧斯特斯爾托丁頓。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Lord William Tracy The Elder Sherriff于1400年出生在英国格盧斯特斯爾托丁頓时，他的父亲Sir William de Tracy II21岁，母亲Alice de la Spine19岁。他和Margaret Pauncefort至少有4个儿子和2个女儿。他去世于1460年在他的家乡享年60岁，埋葬在英国格盧斯特斯爾托丁頓。

nameMeanings.name: Tracy
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Americanized form of some similar (like-sounding) Jewish name.

variants.name: Tracey
meanings: English (of Norman origin): habitational name from Tracy‐Bocage or Tracy‐sur‐Mer (Calvados).

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Lord William Tracy The Elder Sherriff was born in 1400, in Toddington, Gloucestershire, England, his father, Sir William de Tracy II, was 21 and his mother, Alice de la Spine, was 19. He had at least 4 sons and 2 daughters with Margaret Pauncefort. He died in 1460, in his hometown, at the age of 60, and was buried in Toddington, Gloucestershire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lord William Tracy The Elder Sherriff est né en 1400, à Toddington, Gloucestershire, Angleterre, son père, Sir William de Tracy II, avait 21 ans et sa mère, Alice de la Spine, avait 19 ans. Il a eu au moins 4 fils et 2 filles avec Margaret Pauncefort. Il est décédé en 1460, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 60 ans, et a été enterré à Toddington, Gloucestershire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Lord William Tracy The Elder Sherriff 1400 in Toddington, Gloucestershire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir William de Tracy II 21 und seine Mutter Alice de la Spine 19. Er hatte mit Margaret Pauncefort mindestens 4 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb 1460 im Alter von 60 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Toddington, Gloucestershire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Lord William Tracy The Elder Sherriff è nato il nel 1400 nel Toddington, Gloucestershire, England, il suo padre, Sir William de Tracy II, aveva 21 anni e il suo madre, Alice de la Spine, aveva 19 anni. Lui avuto almeno 4 figli e 2 figlie con Margaret Pauncefort. Morì nel 1460, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 60 anni, e fu sepolto a Toddington, Gloucestershire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Lord William Tracy The Elder Sherriffが1400年にイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアトッドイントンで生まれた時，父Sir William de Tracy IIは21歳，母Alice de la Spineは19歳であった。彼はMargaret Pauncefortとの間に少なくとも4人の息子と2人の娘をもうけた。彼は1460年に故郷で60歳で死去し，イギリスグロウセステルシュアイアトッドイントンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Lord William Tracy The Elder Sherriff(이)가 1400년 영국 그루스스터실르 토딩턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir William de Tracy II(은)는 21세였고, 그의 어머니 Alice de la Spine(은)는 19세였다. 그는 Margaret Pauncefort(와)과 적어도 네 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1460년 그의 고향에서 60세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 그루스스터실르 토딩턴에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Lord William Tracy The Elder Sherriff nasceu em 1400, em Toddington, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir William de Tracy II, tinha 21 anos e sua mãe, Alice de la Spine, tinha 19 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 4 filhos e 2 filhas com Margaret Pauncefort. Ele faleceu em 1460, em sua cidade natal, com 60 anos, e foi sepultado em Toddington, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lord William Tracy The Elder Sherriff родился в 1400 г. в местности тоддингтон, глоусестиршир, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir William de Tracy II было 21 год, а матери, которую звали Alice de la Spine, 19. У него было по крайней мере 4 сына и 2 дочери от Margaret Pauncefort. Он умер в 1460 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 60 лет и был похоронен в местности тоддингтон, глоусестиршир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Lord William Tracy The Elder Sherriff nació en 1400, en Toddington, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir William de Tracy II, tenía 21 años y su mamá, Alice de la Spine, tenía 19 años. Tuvo por lo menos 4 hijos y 2 hijas con Margaret Pauncefort. Murió en 1460, en su pueblo, a la edad de 60 años, y fue sepultado en Toddington, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra.
